title: stachys rigida subsp. rigida
intro: Stachys rigida subsp. rigida, also known as the upright witch's thimble or upright hedge nettle, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Stachys rigida subsp. rigida can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to relieve symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
